headline: Marco Palestra
body: 🚨🔵 OFFICIAL: Marco Palestra signs as new Chelsea player. “I’m very excited to get started. I’ve felt the energy since the first day Chelsea wanted me, can’t wait to start; see all the fans, team mates and manager”. “We have so many talented players here, a very strong squad, and manager in Xabi. He spoke to me about how he wants us to play, which is exciting”.
raw_text:
🚨🔵 OFFICIAL: Marco Palestra signs as new Chelsea player.

“I’m very excited to get started. I’ve felt the energy since the first day Chelsea wanted me, can’t wait to start; see all the fans, team mates and manager”.

“We have so many talented players here, a very strong squad, and manager in Xabi. He spoke to me about how he wants us to play, which is exciting”.
text:
🚨🔵 OFFICIAL: Marco Palestra signs as new Chelsea player.

“I’m very excited to get started. I’ve felt the energy since the first day Chelsea wanted me, can’t wait to start; see all the fans, team mates and manager”.

“We have so many talented players here, a very strong squad, and manager in Xabi. He spoke to me about how he wants us to play, which is exciting”.
draft_caption:
🎩 MANAGER- MARCO PALESTRA LINKED WITH THE CHELSEA JOB.
